join_order.note: 25 rows; direct array indexed by n_nationkey (0-24); fits in L1 cache
s_suppkey in [1..100000]; flat array indexed by suppkey; 100KB fits in L1 cache; zero hash overhead
Sequential scan of p_name (112MB); strstr check; set bit for matching p_partkey; bitset fits in L2 cache
8M entries; compact open-addressing hash map; load factor ~0.48; ~192MB; build parallel with 32 threads

join_order.output: mmap pointer for O(1) orderkey -> row_pos -> o_orderdate lookup
join_order.note: Pre-built index; mmap at startup; avoids building 15M-entry hash map; capacity=33554432 slots
For each lineitem row: check bitset(l_partkey) first; only ~4.8% proceed; then probe suppkey array, partsupp map, orders index; compute amount; accumulate into thread-local agg

logical_plan.aggregation_note: 25 nations x 7 years (1992-1998); flat 2D array double[25][8] per thread (index: nation_code x (year-1992)); trivial merge after parallel phase

semi_join_reduction.note: Bitset probe eliminates ~95.2% of lineitem rows before expensive partsupp/orders lookups

data_structures.nation_lookup: flat_array[25] int8_t indexed by n_nationkey (0-24) -> nation_name_code; 25 bytes, L1 resident
data_structures.supplier_lookup: flat_array[100001] int8_t indexed by s_suppkey (1..100000) -> s_nationkey; 100KB, L1/L2 resident
data_structures.part_filter: bitset(2000001 bits = 245KB) indexed by p_partkey; L2 resident; O(1) test per lineitem row
data_structures.partsupp_join: compact_hash_map open-addressing pre_sized(16777216) uint64->double; multiply-shift hash (key*0x9E3779B97F4A7C15ULL>>32)&mask; load_factor=0.48; ~192MB
data_structures.orders_join: mmap_hash_index(orders_orderkey_hash) pre-built single-value hash; capacity=33554432; linear probe; returns pos -> read o_orderdate column at pos; avoids 15M hash map build
data_structures.aggregation: flat_array double[25][8] thread_local; indexed by [nationkey][year-1992]; 25x8x8=1600 bytes per thread; fully L1 resident; zero contention

parallelism.lineitem_parallel_scan: divide 59,986,052 rows into 32 chunks of ~1,874,564 rows; each thread processes its chunk independently
parallelism.partsupp_build: parallel with 32 threads using partitioned construction to avoid lock contention
parallelism.merge_phase: sequential merge of 32 flat arrays double[25][8]; trivial O(32*175) = O(5600) additions

index_usage.access_pattern: bucket = ((uint64_t)(uint32_t)key * 0x9E3779B97F4A7C15ULL >> 32) & (capacity-1); linear probe on key==INT32_MIN sentinel

scan_columns.note: All lineitem columns loaded per morsel; bitset probe on l_partkey gates all subsequent work

output.sort: std::sort on ~175 result tuples; nation ASC, o_year DESC

phase_breakdown.lineitem_scan_probe: ~120ms (60M rows / 32 threads; bitset filters 95.2%; ~2.88M full probes)

estimated_cost.target_comparison: Umbra=196ms, DuckDB=253ms; plan targets sub-200ms via direct array lookups for small dims, bitset semi-join reduction, mmap'd orders index eliminating 15M-entry build cost, thread-local flat agg arrays avoiding contention
